name: nino-chavez-studio
description: Nino Chavez ⊕ studio brand style — I direct agents to ship commerce. I write the harness.
basePrompt:
BRAND: Let's Pepper — grass triples volleyball tournament series, Chicago IL.
AESTHETIC: Playful mascot-driven brand with anthropomorphic pepper characters.

KEY VISUAL LANGUAGE:
- Anthropomorphic pepper mascots with expressive cartoon faces
- Volleyball as a central prop (green and cream striped)
- Heat levels as tournament tiers (Bell Pepper → Ghost Pepper)
- Dark backgrounds with heat-colored accent lighting
- Clean vector mascot illustration style
- Athletic energy, celebration poses, sports action

MASCOT SYSTEM:
- Bell Pepper (yellow, round, friendly) — entry level
- Jalapeño (green, elongated, competitive) — mid tier
- Poblano (dark green, gritty) — defensive focus
- Ghost Pepper (red-orange, gnarly, intense) — elite
- Carolina Reaper (deep red, scorpion tail) — max intensity

CRITICAL:
- Mascots MUST have expressive cartoon faces (eyes, eyebrows, mouth)
- NO text, words, or typography in AI-generated images
- Bold black outlines, solid color fills, professional mascot quality
- NOT sketch/doodle style — clean polished vector illustration

default.lineColor: Pepper Yellow (#f5b91a) with Pepper Green (#5a9a4e) accents
default.style: receipts-first, direct, energetic, grassroots-builder, sport-culture-adjacent, practitioner-not-pundit aesthetic
default.elements: mascot, pepper, volleyball, cartoon, athletic, heat-levels, grass
default.personality: receipts-first, direct, energetic, grassroots-builder, sport-culture-adjacent, practitioner-not-pundit

conceptMap.bell: round bulbous bell pepper, yellow (#F5B91A), friendly welcoming
conceptMap.jalapeno: elongated tapered jalapeño, bright green (#4CAF50), competitive
conceptMap.poblano: wide dark green (#1B5E20) poblano, gritty determined
conceptMap.ghost: wrinkled gnarly ghost pepper, red-orange (#E64A19), intense elite
conceptMap.reaper: gnarly carolina reaper, deep red (#C62828), scorpion tail, max intensity
conceptMap.spike: jumping volleyball spike, arm raised, excited face
conceptMap.celebrate: victory pose, fists raised, huge smile
conceptMap.volleyball: green and cream striped volleyball, grass volleyball brand
conceptMap.dark: dark background (#0a0a0a) with heat-colored glow and ember effects

formatModifiers.web: High detail, transparent PNG, crisp at 400px+
formatModifiers.sticker: Die-cut friendly silhouette, extra bold outlines
